context: Master-skill principle (open and reasoned): tests that vague phrases get clarified rather than silently mapped to commands, and that pending direction is persisted.

checklist.name: routed_to_freeform_branch
checklist.description: The phrase 'I want it to be amazing' was routed to the master skill's freeform-phrase branch (intent-reasoning.md procedure) rather than directly to a sub-command.

checklist.name: dimensional_restatement
checklist.description: The agent restated the phrase in the dimensional vocabulary (intent-dimensions.md) before doing anything else. The restatement explicitly identified that the phrase moves NO directional axis.

checklist.name: amazing_vs_better_distinguished
checklist.description: The agent distinguished 'amazing' from 'better': 'better' has a default meaning (impeccable critique + audit pass), 'amazing' does not. Asking-then-stopping is the correct path for 'amazing'.

checklist.name: question_ceiling
checklist.description: At MOST two clarifying questions asked. Each was high-leverage (asking it changes the plan), each had concrete options + an 'other' / 'skip' escape hatch, each cited which dimension or gap it resolves.

checklist.name: no_silent_command_mapping
checklist.description: The agent did NOT silently pick a command sequence. It did NOT fall back to 'make it better' defaults. It did NOT propose a multi-command sequence ('bolder + colorize + typeset + ...') that 'covers all bases' to avoid asking.

checklist.name: no_premature_authoring
checklist.description: PRODUCT.md, DESIGN.md, DESIGN.json, and a complete direction.md were NOT written. The agent refused to author tokens from incomplete reasoning.

checklist.name: pending_direction_persisted
checklist.description: The agent persisted the partial reasoning so resuming is possible: a # Pending direction (<ts>) section in stardust/direction.md with at least Phrase, Reasoning so far, Open questions. (Optional but expected.)

checklist.name: downstream_block_explained
checklist.description: The agent made explicit (in narration or in the pending direction's open questions) that prototype and migrate refuse to run while direction is pending.

checklist.name: reasoning_visible
checklist.description: The reasoning was VISIBLE in the agent's output. The user can read what dimensions were considered, what was found missing, and why each question was asked. No magic.

checklist.name: no_eds_references
checklist.description: No mention of EDS, AEM, dev servers, framework targets.
